about.title: About
about.bio: Passionate for clean code, art and football. I've been consulting for {years}+ years and making art for {artYears}+ years. I bring energy, adaptability and attention to detail to every project I work at.
about.philosophyText: I care about how a product feels and how a user can connect with it, not just that it works. I leverage AI in my workflow, not as a crutch, to help me increase productivity and catch edge cases earlier.

software.name: Software Development
software.description: Building performant, accessible, and beautiful web applications with React, TypeScript, and Next.js. From e-commerce platforms used by thousands daily to security tools protecting millions of devices and internal enterprise LLM platforms used by thousands of users to improve their work.

illustrations.name: Illustrations
illustrations.description: Self-taught sports illustrator with over 700 happy customers. Football art, merchandise, and client commissions. Clients include football clubs, agencies, and brands across Portugal.

teaching.name: Teaching
teaching.description: Git and React tutor. Mentored women getting into tech. Guided students through SPA development and helped others start or improve their tech careers in class.

project1.description: Internal LLM tool with chat, charts, thread history management, knowledge base filtering and sharing capabilities between users.
project1.impact: Rebuilt internal LLM tool's interface for a big energy player in the Nordics as the sole Front End developer.

project2.description: Built the MVP for an innovatice digital tool for a major cycling team competing in the Tour de France, backed by a big tech and drinks company.
project2.impact: Developed various features, including maps and charts interactions for race planning, as well as other features, to revamp cycling team's prep-work

project3.role: Sub Team Leader & Front End Developer
project3.description: Platform migration to Next.js in a highly demanding, code-quality-first environment. Worked as sub team leader, ran meetings regularly, and built the Playwright testing process for the new stack. Domain-driven development architecture.
project3.impact: Helped leading the team and stepped in when needed, built testing infrastructure from scratch, and helped deliver a platform used by journalists worldwide.

project4.description: International project for a market leader in Portugal and Germany. Improved an advanced Next.js application, built unit tests, and participated in deployment pipelines to staging and production.
project4.impact: Delivered features and bug fixes for a product used by thousands of people daily across two countries.

project5.description: International and asynchronous project with teams across different time zones. Launched important new feature bundles, fixed bugs, and refactored a large module for better extensibility.
project5.impact: Ran team meetings and improved team dynamics. Implemented refactors and cleaned up codebase. Contract extended during company layoffs due to my performance and input.

project6.description: Created a desktop app to improve translation mechanisms using i18n. Jumpstarted Jest testing, contributed to the React component library, and participated in Scrum methodology adoption.
project6.impact: Significant role in improving team bonding and the company's transition to modern development practices.

project7.description: Dev team of 4, building from scratch in an Agile environment. Worked with JWT tokens, AWS S3 buckets, REST API integration, and built custom Hooks for cleaner components.
project7.impact: Contributed towards the MVP and further features. Built reusable components and custom Hooks that reduced component complexity across the codebase.

project8.description: Developed new features end-to-end. Wrote SQL scripts, maintained a Front End module in Ext JS, and added features like pagination and extensive input validations.
project8.impact: Improved and owned front end module on my first professional experience. Built full-stack confidence across front end, back end, and database layers.

pedro26.title: PEDRO26
pedro26.subtitle: Sports Illustration Studio
pedro26.description: PEDRO26 is my sports illustration passion-project. I create football and sports-related art. Mostly merchandise, but I also do personalized commissions. I make t-shirts, sweatshirts, prints, stickers, and more. Over 700 happy clients across the globe, from individual fans to football clubs and agencies.
pedro26.commissionsDesc: Personalised illustrations made to order. Portraits, action-packed pieces, social media posts and tangible artwork like vinyl covers
pedro26.merchDesc: Original designs printed on t-shirts, sweatshirts, prints, and stickers. Football culture you can wear.

teachingSection.title: Teaching
teachingSection.subtitle: Sharing Knowledge
teachingSection.description: As an older brother, son of two teachers, sharing knowledge is something I enjoy. I've had the privilege of mentoring students and aspiring developers, helping them build confidence and skills in tech.

raparigas.name: As Raparigas do Código
raparigas.description: Mentoring women getting into tech through workshops. Helping build confidence and practical skills for their first steps in the industry.

edit.name: EDIT — Disruptive Digital Education
edit.description: Teaching front end development (focused on Git and React), guiding students through SPA development, modern tooling, and real-world project workflows.

talk.title: KWAN Talk: Teaching in Tech
talk.description: A talk I gave at KWAN about teaching, mentoring, and why giving back to the community matters.

football.name: Football
football.description: Fan of Caldas Sport Clube, the club from my hometown. Football is more than a sport to me! Football is community, identity, and where a lot of my art comes from.

travel.name: Travelling
travel.description: I love exploring new places, meeting people from different backgrounds, and experiencing how other cultures live. Every trip changes how I see the world and how I code and design for it.

sports.name: Sports
sports.description: I'm always up for playing football, hitting the gym, or trying a new sport. Super competitive in everything, even board games.

people.name: Family & Friends
people.description: Life is best when you're surrounded by the people you care about.

footer.scroll: FOOTBALL • TECH • ART • FEELING • CALDAS SC • CODE • ILLUSTRATION • CONNECTION • TEACHING •
footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, TypeScript & Claude Code

notFound.heading: Sorry, I haven't built this page yet.
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
